title: Air Products to Increase Production Capacity at its LNG Equipment Manufacturing Facility in Port Manatee, Florida
text: LNG Market Leader Focused on Meeting Industry Demand LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD), the world's leader in liquefied natural gas (LNG) technology and equipment, today announced it will be making a significant investment to meet industry demand with increased winding capacity at its LNG equipment manufacturing facility located in Port Manatee, Florida.

title: Air Products to Provide Nitrogen Liquefaction Refrigeration System to one of the World's Largest Physics Experiment Studying the Origins of the Universe
text: Air Products Signs Contract with Fermi Research Alliance LLC, a U.S. Department of Energy  national lab, for Multi-Year Project underway at the Deep Underground Neutrino Experiment   in South Dakota LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Not with a big bang but with the quiet stroke of a pen, representatives of Air Products and Fermi Research Alliance LLC (FRA), which manages and operates the U.S. DOE Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory known as Fermilab, signed a contract for Air Products to supply a custom nitrogen liquefier equipment package to support research of the Deep Underground Neutrino Experiment, DUNE.

title: Air Products to Supply Hydrogen and Fueling Technology to Edmonton International Airport for Alberta's First Hydrogen Fuel Cell Passenger Vehicle Fleet
text: An Air Products mobile hydrogen refueler will be stationed at the airport so hydrogen fuel cell vehicles can begin fueling next week LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , July 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD), the world's largest producer of hydrogen and a first-mover in energy transition projects, today announced that it has been selected by Edmonton International Airport as the hydrogen and technology provider for Alberta's first hydrogen fuel cell passenger vehicle fleet.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's June 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $2,111.31 of dividend income for June 2023 compared with $1,825.40 of dividend income for June 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.9K as of June 30, 2023, vs. $493.5K on June 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.44%. title: Air Products to Showcase Latest Developments in Liquefied Natural Gas Technology and Equipment at LNG2023 in Vancouver
text: Air Products' Chief Operating Officer to Participate in  "Fueling the LNG Innovation Agenda" during Plenary Conference Session  LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , July 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD), the world's leader in liquefied natural gas (LNG) technology and equipment, will showcase the latest developments in LNG liquefaction technology at LNG2023, the 20th International Conference & Exhibition on liquefied natural gas from July 10-13 at the Vancouver Convention Centre in British Columbia, Canada.

title: Air Products to Broadcast Fiscal Third Quarter Earnings Teleconference on August 3, 2023
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD) will release its fiscal 2023 third quarter financial results prior to market open on Thursday, August 3, 2023 and will review these results in a teleconference at 8:30 a.m.

title: Growth, Yield, Aristocracy: Air Products and Chemicals' Trifecta
text: Air Products and Chemicals is a trusted chemical company positioned to benefit from emerging trends like hydrogen, with a strong business model and 40 consecutive annual dividend hikes. APD is a leader in clean hydrogen production and distribution, aligning with global efforts to transition to a low-carbon economy, providing long-term growth potential. The company combines investments in operations with rewarding shareholders, demonstrated by its sustainable dividends, significant cash flow generation, and ability to undertake high-return projects, making it an attractive investment option.
